CommunityApplications.Profile:
**Bifrost** — a self-hosted smart home control hub.
Bifrost bridges your lights (Philips Hue, Govee, LIFX), audio (Sonos, Onkyo / Integra), and any Home Assistant integration behind one fast web UI and REST API. Rooms are the core abstraction; scenes are server-side full-state snapshots. Reliability is the point: explicit reconnect state machines, polling fallback, and live push to the browser. Ships as a single static binary with a single SQLite file.
This repository hosts the Unraid Community Applications template for Bifrost. Install it from the **Apps** tab, set a `BIFROST_SECRET`, and open the web UI on port 3000.
Source & issues: https://github.com/others-git/bifrost
